---
name: Add a service
about: Request or contribute a new service to the registry
title: 'Add service: '
labels: registry
assignees: ''
---

**Service name**
e.g., Firecrawl

**Package name(s)**
e.g., `firecrawl-js`, `@firecrawl/sdk`

**Environment variable(s)**
e.g., `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY`

**Billing model**
e.g., credit pool, per-request, flat monthly

**Has a billing API?**
Yes / No / Unknown. If yes, link the endpoint docs.

**Pricing page**
Link to the service's pricing page.

**Gotchas**
Any known cost surprises (optional but very helpful).
